purpose: V_phen_GWT_v2 backbone-baseline-relative criterion 위한 baseline registry. cross-base measurement (commit prior) + 본 cycle 시도 (5 backbones, 3 successful). raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25.

V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.use_case: Mk.XI fine-tuned model이 3 backbones 평균 baseline + 0.05 이상 → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.raw_12_lock: post-hoc 변경 금지, registry expansion (more backbones) 시 raw#12 new revision
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.backbone_specific_alternative: (option) per-backbone baseline 사용 시 model_specific_PASS = post_tune >= backbone_baseline + 0.05

raw10_honest_findings.F1_high_variance: std=0.273 (CV=0.54) — 3 backbones 간 GWT 큰 분산. baseline registry expansion 필요 (5+ backbones for stable mean).
raw10_honest_findings.F2_gated_models_blocked: Llama-3.1-8B + gemma-2-9b 모두 HF gated repo — 본 cycle 측정 불가. HF token (HF_TOKEN env) 필요.
raw10_honest_findings.F3_mistral_outlier: Mistral 0.891이 outlier (mean+1.4*std). registry mean 추정 시 Mistral 빼면 mean=0.317 — 매우 다른 threshold.
raw10_honest_findings.F4_v2_threshold_sensitivity: registry expansion이 PASS threshold에 큰 영향. 본 baseline은 'preliminary' tag 필요. 더 많은 backbones (5-10) measurement 후 registry final freeze.

next_cycle_required: HF token authentication for Llama-3.1, gemma-2-9b → 5 backbone registry
Additional non-gated backbones: Phi-3-medium, DeepSeek-v3-base, Yi-1.5-9B → 7-8 backbone registry
Mk.XI fine-tuned model V_phen_GWT measurement → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS verdict

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — orchestration via main session bash+ssh, helper /tmp emit
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — gated 2 backbones FAIL 명시, std high variance disclosure, registry preliminary tag
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — V_phen_GWT_v2 predicate frozen, registry expansion은 raw#12 new revision
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for backbone baseline registry
raw_compliance.POLICY_R4: 기존 V_phen_GWT v1 spec scope 변경 0건, v2 별도 revision
